buyTokenWithETH(address,uint256,bytes).details: Records cost basis via balanceOf delta. Path must start with WETH.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

permissionlessRebalance(address,uint256,.details: Unlock conditions: ROI >= 1000% AND 14 days since ROI tier reached with no operator rebalance

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

rescueDeadPoolToken(address,bytes).details: Swaps to WETH only. Only for tokens that have been bought via buyTokenWithETH.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

buyTokenWithETH(address,uint256,bytes).notice: Buy any ERC20 token with ETH via Universal Router

buybackWithUSDC(uint256).notice: Buy USD with USDC: USDC -> WETH -> USD via official pool

buybackWithWETH(uint256).notice: Buy USD with WETH via official pool

getCaps(uint8).notice: Get current caps for an action type

getRemainingDailyBudget(uint8).notice: Get remaining daily budget for an action

getTokenInfo(address).notice: Get token info for a purchased token

getUnlockedAmount(address).notice: Get unlocked amount for permissionless rebalance

isPermissionlessAvailable(address).notice: Check if permissionless rebalance is available for a token

permissionlessRebalance(address,uint256,.notice: Permissionless rebalance — anyone can call if conditions met

rebalance(address,uint256,bytes,bytes).notice: Operator rebalance: 75% -> WETH -> USD, 25% -> USDC to recipient

rescueDeadPoolToken(address,bytes).notice: Rescue tokens from dead pool (90+ days no interaction)

setSlippage(uint256).notice: Set operator slippage (does not affect immutable 3% permissionless slippage)

unstake(uint256).notice: Unstake from staking contract. No caps, no cooldown.

updateCaps(uint8,uint256,uint256).notice: Update caps for an action type (operator only, never affects permissionless)
